# Algo Trade Workspace — LLM Directory Index (llms.txt)

> Quantitative & Algorithmic Trading Platform for NIFTY / BANKNIFTY Options & Equities

## Submodules

### 1. `app/client` (Client Workstation & Worker Edge)
- Full AI Context: [llm.txt](file:///Users/aravind_appadurai/personal-projects/Algo-Trade/app/client/llm.txt)
- Code Review: [review.md](file:///Users/aravind_appadurai/personal-projects/Algo-Trade/app/client/review.md)
- Knowledge Framework: [OKF.md](file:///Users/aravind_appadurai/personal-projects/Algo-Trade/app/client/OKF.md)
- Fast Lookup Index: [AI_INDEX.md](file:///Users/aravind_appadurai/personal-projects/Algo-Trade/app/client/AI_INDEX.md)
- Agent Rules: [AGENTS.md](file:///Users/aravind_appadurai/personal-projects/Algo-Trade/app/client/AGENTS.md)

### 2. `app/core` (Core Strategy Engine & Models)
- Standard quantitative engine module.

### 3. `app/cron` (Market Data Ingestion)
- Scheduled jobs for historical and daily tick data ingestion.
